landing.hero_title: Building an inclusive society for a healthier future
landing.hero_text: PSTC works to improve the quality of life of poor and socially disadvantaged people through inclusive services, rights-based action, training, and partnerships.
landing.impact_text: For more than four decades, PSTC has helped transform communities through health, rights, and sustainable development.

about.title: About Us
about.subtitle: Who We Are
about.heading: A trusted community partner for health, rights, and inclusion.
about.description: PSTC is a non-government, not-for-profit voluntary organization working to improve the quality of life of poor and socially disadvantaged people through inclusive services, advocacy, training, and partnerships.
about.mission_text: Deliver inclusive, innovative, quality services and rights-based advocacy.
about.vision_text: A society where everyone can live with dignity, rights, and opportunity.
about.values_text: Commitment, integrity, transparency, accountability, and team spirit.
about.tagline: Rooted in trust. Built for future impact.

programs.title: Our Focus Areas
programs.subtitle: Programs
programs.description: PSTC works across health, youth, gender, climate, skills, advocacy, and community development to create sustainable impact.

health.title: Population Health and Nutrition
health.description: Inclusive quality health, SRHR, nutrition, and community-based service access.

youth.title: Youth and Adolescent Development
youth.description: Youth voice, adolescent wellbeing, life skills, advocacy, and safe learning spaces.

gender.title: Gender and Governance
gender.description: Rights-based governance, gender equity, protection, safeguarding, and inclusion.

climate.title: Climate Change and Adaptation
climate.description: Preparedness, resilient communities, inclusion, and climate-sensitive development.

skills.title: Skills Education and Training
skills.description: Practical training, certification, employment support, and institution-based learning.

projects.title: Featured Projects
projects.subtitle: Projects
projects.heading: Program cards designed for discovery, trust, and conversion.
projects.description: Inspired by global NGO sites, the project area uses filters, tags, and short outcomes so visitors can scan quickly.

urban_health.title: Urban Health Care
urban_health.text: Strengthening inclusive primary health access and referral support.

focus.title: FOCUS
focus.text: Fortifying organizational capacity to uphold the SRHR movement in Bangladesh.

pud.title: PUD
pud.text: Supportive service pathways for people who use drugs and vulnerable populations.

cmp.title: CMP
cmp.text: Community mobilization for rights, protection, awareness, and service access.

sufasec.title: SUFASEC
sufasec.text: A child protection initiative against sexual exploitation of children.

levis.title: LEVIS
levis.text: Learning, employability, vocational readiness, and practical skills development.

hope.title: HOPE
hope.text: Health outreach and protection for inclusive service access.

sprint.title: SPRINT
sprint.text: Preparedness and response support for resilient community systems.

impact.title: Our Presence
impact.subtitle: Impact
impact.heading: Community-centered change, built with trust.
impact.description: PSTC works alongside communities to make services more inclusive, accessible, and sustainable across health, protection, skills, youth engagement, and climate resilience.
impact.design_principle: Design for dignity first. Then make every pathway simple, safe, and useful.

ucon.title: uCon: youth voice, learning, and advocacy.
ucon.subtitle: Youth Platform
ucon.description: Explore ideas, ask questions, access CSE modules, join advocacy, and complete assessment-based certification through a youth-friendly learning gateway.

ask.title: Ask Questions
ask.text: Safe query submission and helpful youth-friendly guidance.

explore.title: Explore Ideas
explore.text: Community ideas, youth action, and innovation prompts.

cse.title: CSE Modules
cse.text: Modules 1 to 8 designed as learning cards.

publications.title: Publications & Knowledge Hub
publications.subtitle: Publications
publications.heading: Turn reports, research, and newsletters into a searchable trust center.
publications.description: Global NGO sites use reports, resources, and stories to build credibility. PSTC can make publications one of the homepage's strongest trust signals.

annual_report.title: Annual Report 2025
annual_report.text: A complete snapshot of PSTC programs, reach, governance, and organizational progress.

projanmo_kotha.title: Projanmo Kotha
projanmo_kotha.text: Stories, program updates, youth engagement highlights, and field-level learning.

research_brief.title: Research Brief: Youth Health & Rights
research_brief.text: Evidence summary on adolescent health, SRHR awareness, and service access.

health_initiative.title: PSTC launches integrated community health initiative
health_initiative.text: Strengthening inclusive primary health access and referral support across Bangladesh.

youth_dialogue.title: Youth dialogue on SRHR, climate resilience, and inclusion
youth_dialogue.text: Young people joined community dialogue sessions focused on rights, resilience, and inclusive development.

paramedic_training.title: New community paramedic training cohort opens
paramedic_training.text: Training opportunities continue to build practical skills, employment readiness, and community care capacity.

partners.title: Partners & Networks
partners.subtitle: Partners
partners.heading: Credibility through collaboration.
partners.description: A logo-cloud area builds confidence for donors, communities, affiliates, and technical partners.

get_involved.title: Get Involved
get_involved.subtitle: Get Involved
get_involved.heading: Help create impact that lasts.
get_involved.description: Give today, join a training, apply for opportunities, or partner with PSTC to expand inclusive community services.

give_today.title: Give Today
give_today.text: Support inclusive services and community impact.

join_training.title: Join Training
join_training.text: Explore certification, policy, and skills learning.
